meta.tagline: The largest free online tools platform

home.headline: Every tool you need. Zero friction.
home.supporting: Format, convert, encode, and analyze — free developer and productivity tools in one premium workspace.
home.categoriesSupporting: Browse by what you are building.
home.featuredSupporting: Start with the utilities teams open every day.

auth.loginSupporting: Sign in to sync favorites and history.
auth.registerSupporting: Free forever for core tools. Upgrade when you need more.
auth.name: Name
auth.confirmEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, then sign in.

errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.emptyFavorites: No favorites yet. Star a tool to pin it here.
dashboard.emptyHistory: No history yet. Run a tool while signed in to see it here.

pricing.title: Simple pricing
pricing.supporting: Start free. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited runs, no ads, and higher API limits.

blog.title: Blog
blog.supporting: Guides, product updates, and tooling tips.
blog.empty: No posts yet. Check back soon.

admin.title: Admin
admin.supporting: Platform health, tool builder, and usage overview.
admin.gtmCommandSupporting: Executive KPIs across product, revenue, SEO, and API usage.
admin.gtmToolScoresSupporting: Traffic, usage, revenue, SEO, and retention priority ranking.
admin.gtmToolScoresEmpty: No scores yet. Wait for daily recompute.
admin.gtmSeoTasksSupporting: Actionable tasks from keywords, health, and opportunities.
admin.gtmGrowthTasksEmpty: No growth tasks yet. Run the agent.
admin.gtmReadinessSupporting: Infrastructure, SEO, analytics, payments, email, security, monitoring.
admin.gtmReadinessEmpty: No checks yet. Run the checklist.
admin.builderSupporting: Define UI fields and a pipeline, then publish to the registry.
admin.builderJsonError: UI schema or pipeline must be valid JSON.
admin.apiKeysNote: User API keys are managed on the Developers portal. This tab shows an admin AI usage summary.
admin.growthEmpty: No data in this window yet.
admin.seoHealthSupporting: Metadata, schema, links, content, keywords, and performance.
admin.seoAutopilotSupporting: Scan and apply safe SEO fixes — never auto-publish without approval.
admin.seoAutopilotEmpty: No open autopilot issues. Run a scan.
admin.growthAgentSupporting: Analyze traffic, SEO, tools, and revenue for prioritized actions.
admin.growthAgentEmpty: No insights yet. Run the agent.
admin.growthAgentActionsSupporting: Approve-gated actions never auto-execute without review.
admin.competitorsSupporting: Track domains and gap opportunities. Recompute after seeding.
admin.competitorsDomainsEmpty: No domains. Run seed_competitors or add one.
admin.competitorsOpportunitiesEmpty: No open opportunities. Recompute after adding domains.
admin.backlinksSupporting: Targets, campaigns, and outreach opportunities — status changes are manual.
admin.revenueAdPerformanceEmpty: No daily ad performance rows yet.
admin.revenueAdRecsSupporting: Generate placement optimizations — accept or dismiss each recommendation.
admin.workflowsAdminSupporting: Seeded templates available to users in the workflow builder.
admin.creatorsSupporting: Approve tool/template submissions from the creator hub.
admin.intelSupporting: Ranked opportunities from GSC demand, SEO potential, and category gaps.
admin.intelEmpty: No opportunities yet. Run seed_tool_templates and recompute.
admin.keywordsSupporting: GSC impressions as volume proxy. Empty until Search Console sync.
admin.autopilotSupporting: Runs stop at human review — never auto-publish by default.
admin.emailSupporting: Newsletter campaigns and weekly digest (Celery beat).
admin.limitsSupporting: Free vs Pro (slug premium). Seed with seed_plans.
admin.factorySupporting: Create specs from recipes, then build and publish.

developers.title: Developers
developers.supporting: Authenticate with X-API-Key, respect rate limits, and automate ToolVerse from your stack.
developers.docsSupporting: All marketplace requests use the JSON envelope { success, data }.
developers.authBody: Send your secret key in the X-API-Key header. Keys are shown once at creation — store them securely.
developers.rateDefault: Default: 60 requests per minute per key (configurable).
developers.rateQuota: Monthly quota defaults to 10,000 units per key.
developers.rateHeaders: 429 responses mean you should back off and retry.
developers.openapiBody: Download the machine-readable schema for code generation and Enterprise integrations.
developers.sdkBody: Use the workspace package @toolverse/api-client for marketplace and mobile endpoints. Regenerate the stub with manage.py generate_sdk.
developers.billingBody: Monthly invoice drafts are generated from API usage aggregates. They stay draft until you reconcile billing externally.
developers.billingInvoices: GET /marketplace/invoices/ — draft ApiInvoiceStub rows from usage
developers.billingAnalytics: GET /marketplace/analytics/ — daily usage and per-key breakdown
developers.enterpriseBody: Developer organizations, usage analytics, and invoice stubs for billed API access. Create an org from your account API or contact sales for Enterprise tier.
developers.keysSupporting: Create, list, and revoke keys for programmatic access.
developers.loginRequired: Sign in to create and manage API keys.
developers.keyOnce: Copy this key now — it will not be shown again.
developers.keysEmpty: No keys yet. Create one to get started.

tool.asyncHint: Async jobs run in the background while you wait.
tool.asyncLoginHint: Sign in to run this tool as an async job.

footer.newsletterSupporting: New tools, guides, and tips — unsubscribe anytime.

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.supporting: Saved outputs and tool collections in one place.
workspace.loginRequired: Sign in to access your workspace.
workspace.emptyCollections: No collections yet. Create one to organize tools.

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.average: {rating} average · {count, plural, one {# review} other {# reviews}}
reviews.empty: No reviews yet. Be the first to share feedback.
reviews.loginRequired: Sign in to leave a review.
reviews.submitted: Thanks — your review is pending moderation.

assistant.title: AI Assistant
assistant.supporting: Ask which tool fits your task.
assistant.welcome: Hi! Tell me what you need — formatting JSON, generating UUIDs, converting colors — and I will suggest tools.
assistant.placeholder: What do you want to do?
